title: SAMVAD Response Envelope
description: Response returned by POST /agent/message (sync) or delivered via webhook/polling for async tasks.

traceId.description: Root correlation ID propagated from the request.

spanId.description: Unique identifier for the responder's span.

status.description: 'ok' on success, 'error' on any protocol or handler failure.

result.description: Skill output on success. Must conform to the skill's declared outputSchema. Absent on error.

error.description: Error details. Present only when status is 'error'.
